title: berkheya glabriuscula
intro: Berkheya glabriuscula, also known as the small-leaved berkheya or small-leafed berkheya, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and skin issues. The health benefits of Berkheya glabriuscula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it may be used as a topical cream or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
